---
title: "novo_all_data_interactive"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggiraph)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)
```

All paths/variables at once here:
```{r}
probs_csv <- "/Volumes/T7 Shield/novo_cleavage_site_predictions/novo_alldata_l18_no_TMRs_50_60_logreg_crf_svm_probs.csv"
```


### 2. Load combined probs CSV and prepare data

```{r}
#probs_csv <- "/Volumes/T7 Shield/novo_cleavage_site_predictions/novo_smORF_all_models_probs.csv"
probs_csv <- "/Volumes/T7 Shield/novo_cleavage_site_predictions/novo_alldata_l18_no_TMRs_50_60_logreg_crf_svm_probs.csv"

probs_df <- readr::read_csv(probs_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  transmute(
    Entry            = as.character(Entry),
    position         = as.integer(residue_number),
    residue          = as.character(residue),
    prob_logreg      = as.numeric(prob_logreg),
    prob_crf         = as.numeric(prob_crf),
    prob_svm         = as.numeric(prob_svm),
    prob_mean        = as.numeric(prob_mean),
    prob_logreg_norm = as.numeric(prob_logreg_norm),
    prob_crf_norm    = as.numeric(prob_crf_norm),
    prob_svm_norm    = as.numeric(prob_svm_norm),
    prob_mean_norm   = as.numeric(prob_mean_norm)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Entry, position)

length(unique(probs_df$Entry))

```



```{r}
# FASTA used for these entries
fasta_path_seq <- "../../data/novo_alldata_l18_no_TMRs_50_to_60.fasta"

fa_lines <- readLines(fasta_path_seq)

# indices of header lines
hdr_idx <- which(startsWith(fa_lines, ">"))
if (length(hdr_idx) == 0) {
  stop("No FASTA headers found in ", fasta_path_seq)
}

# sequence spans from header+1 up to before next header (or end of file)
seq_end <- c(hdr_idx[-1] - 1, length(fa_lines))

seq_vec <- purrr::map2_chr(
  hdr_idx,
  seq_end,
  ~ paste(fa_lines[(.x + 1):.y], collapse = "")
)

desc_vec <- sub("^>", "", fa_lines[hdr_idx])  # without leading '>'

# token just after '>' for Entry parsing
entry_token <- sub("^>", "", fa_lines[hdr_idx])
entry_token <- sub(" .*", "", entry_token)

# if UniProt-like: sp|ACC|NAME → ACC, else use token
entry_vec <- ifelse(
  grepl("\\|", entry_token),
  vapply(strsplit(entry_token, "\\|"), `[`, character(1), 2),
  entry_token
)

seq_info <- tibble::tibble(
  Entry       = entry_vec,
  description = paste0(">", desc_vec),  # line 1 in tooltip, includes '>'
  sequence    = seq_vec                 # line 2 in tooltip
)

```

```{r}
np_flags <- readr::read_csv(
  "../../data/novo_alldata_filter_out_enzymes/neuropeptide_filter/novo_neuropeptide_similarity_flags.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Entry       = as.character(Entry),
    percent_sim = as.numeric(percent_sim)
  )
```

```{r}
signalp_df <- readr::read_csv(
  "../../data/novo_signalP_scores_50_60.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Entry = as.character(Entry),
    signal_prob = as.numeric(signal_prob)
  )

canon_strg_id <- function(x) {
  x <- stringr::str_trim(x)

  # unify separators
  x <- stringr::str_replace_all(x, ":", "_")

  # turn "-chr" or "+chr" into "_chr" (so strand sign doesn't affect matching)
  x <- stringr::str_replace_all(x, "[-+]chr", "_chr")

  # parse STRG + chr + coords + F/P (M is just literal)
  m <- stringr::str_match(
    x,
    "^(STRG\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+).*?_chr([^_]+)_([0-9]+)-([0-9]+).*?_F_([0-9]+)_P_([0-9]+)_M$"
  )

  out <- ifelse(
    is.na(m[,1]),
    NA_character_,
    paste0(m[,2], "_chr", m[,3], "_", m[,4], "-", m[,5], "_F_", m[,6], "_P_", m[,7], "_M")
  )
  out
}

probs_df <- probs_df %>% mutate(Entry_key = canon_strg_id(Entry))
signalp_df <- signalp_df %>% mutate(Entry_key = canon_strg_id(Entry))

probs_df <- probs_df %>%
  left_join(
    signalp_df %>% dplyr::select(Entry_key, signal_prob),
    by = "Entry_key"
  )

# quick sanity check
dplyr::n_distinct(signalp_df$Entry)
```


You should see `1119` printed.

### 3. Helper: interactive profile for a single Entry + one model

```{r}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) y else x

make_profile_girafe <- function(entry_id, model_col, model_label = NULL) {
  model_label <- model_label %||% model_col
  
  df_e <- probs_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    prob = .data[[model_col]]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(position) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bar_fill = dplyr::if_else(
      residue %in% c("R", "K"),
      "RK",      # highlight these
      "Other"    # everything else
    )
  )
  
  if (nrow(df_e) == 0) {
    stop(glue::glue("No data found for Entry = {entry_id}"))
  }
  
  # --- look up description + sequence for the title tooltip ---
  info <- seq_info %>%
    dplyr::filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1)
  
  # line 1: >description
  title_desc <- info$description %||% glue::glue(">{entry_id}")
  
  # raw sequence (fallback: reconstruct from residues)
  raw_seq <- info$sequence %||% paste(df_e$residue, collapse = "")
  
  # break sequence into lines of 50 residues
  if (!is.na(raw_seq) && nchar(raw_seq) > 0) {
    starts <- seq(1, nchar(raw_seq), by = 50)
    seq_lines <- vapply(
      starts,
      function(i) substr(raw_seq, i, min(i + 49, nchar(raw_seq))),
      character(1L)
    )
    title_seq_block <- paste(seq_lines, collapse = "\n")
  } else {
    title_seq_block <- ""
  }
  
  # tooltip: line 1 = >description, subsequent lines = sequence chunks
  title_tooltip <- glue::glue("{title_desc}\n{title_seq_block}")
  
  # --- optional layer-18 probability (only if novo_smORF_50k_filtered exists) ---
  l18_prob <- tryCatch(
    {
      if (exists("novo_smORF_50k_filtered", inherits = TRUE)) {
        tmp <- novo_smORF_50k_filtered %>%
          dplyr::filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
          dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
          dplyr::pull(probability)
        if (length(tmp) == 0) NA_real_ else tmp[1]
      } else {
        NA_real_
      }
    },
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )

  # --- SignalP probability (SP(Sec/SPI)) ---
  sp_prob <- df_e$signal_prob[1]

  # --- build 2-line title ---
  line1 <- glue::glue("{entry_id} ({model_label})")
  
  metrics <- c()
  if (!is.na(l18_prob)) metrics <- c(metrics, glue::glue("layer-18 prob: {sprintf('%.1f%%', l18_prob * 100)}"))
  if (!is.na(sp_prob))  metrics <- c(metrics, glue::glue("SignalP prob: {sprintf('%.4f', sp_prob)}"))
  
  line2 <- paste(metrics, collapse = "  —  ")
  
  title_label <- if (nzchar(line2)) paste0(line1, "\n", line2) else line1

  
  # --- neuropeptide similarity flag (subtitle) ---
  flag_row <- np_flags %>%
    dplyr::filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1)
  
  has_flag <- nrow(flag_row) == 1 && !is.na(flag_row$percent_sim)
  
  if (has_flag) {
    ps    <- flag_row$percent_sim[[1]]
    ce    <- flag_row$closest_neurpeptide_entry[[1]]
    cdesc <- flag_row$closest_neurpeptide_description[[1]]
    
    subtitle_text <- glue::glue(
      "percent sim to neuropep: {sprintf('%.1f', ps)}%"
    )
    
    subtitle_tooltip <- glue::glue(
      "percent sim to neuropep: {sprintf('%.1f', ps)}%\n",
      "closest neuropep Entry: {ce}\n",
      "closest neuropep desc: {cdesc}"
    )
  } else {
    subtitle_text    <- NULL
    subtitle_tooltip <- NULL
  }
  
  seq_len <- max(df_e$position, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_max   <- suppressWarnings(max(df_e$prob, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(y_max) || y_max <= 0) y_max <- 1
  y_lim   <- max(1, y_max) * 1.05
  
  # x-axis: residues as labels (upright)
  x_breaks <- df_e$position
  x_labels <- df_e$residue
  
  # wider SVG for long sequences -> horizontal scroll via wrapper div
  width_svg <- if (seq_len > 150) seq_len / 10 else 11
  
  # small left padding (about a "tab") for title/subtitle
  title_x    <- 1 + max(1, seq_len * 0.01)
  subtitle_x <- title_x
  
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(df_e) +
    # main interactive title (left-aligned near upper-left)
    ggiraph::geom_text_interactive(
      data = tibble::tibble(
        x       = title_x,
        y       = y_lim * 1.18,
        label   = title_label,
        tooltip = title_tooltip,
        data_id = entry_id
      ),
      mapping = ggplot2::aes(
        x = x,
        y = y,
        label = label,
        tooltip = tooltip,
        data_id = data_id
      ),
      size  = 4,
      hjust = 0,        # left-align text at x
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    # dark-red subtitle directly under title, also left-aligned
    {
      if (has_flag) {
        ggiraph::geom_text_interactive(
          data = tibble::tibble(
            x       = subtitle_x,
            y       = y_lim * 1.08,
            label   = subtitle_text,
            tooltip = subtitle_tooltip,
            data_id = paste0(entry_id, "_npflag")
          ),
          mapping = ggplot2::aes(
            x = x,
            y = y,
            label = label,
            tooltip = tooltip,
            data_id = data_id
          ),
          size  = 3.5,
          color = "darkred",
          hjust = 0,   # left-align subtitle as well
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        )
      } else {
        NULL
      }
    } +
    
    # bars: probabilities per residue
    ggiraph::geom_col_interactive(
      ggplot2::aes(
        x       = position,
        y       = prob,
        fill    = bar_fill,   # <- use our new column
        tooltip = glue::glue(
          "Entry: {Entry}\n",
          "Model: {model_label}\n",
          "Position: {position}\n",
          "Residue:  {residue}\n",
          "Probability: {round(prob, 3)}"
        ),
        data_id = paste0(Entry, "_", position)
      ),
      color = "gray40",
      size  = 0.1,
      width = 1,
      alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Other" = "steelblue",  # default bars
        "RK"    = "#ffd800"     # yellow for R/K
      ),
      guide = "none"            # no fill legend
    ) +

    ggplot2::geom_hline(
      yintercept = 0.5,
      linetype   = "dashed",
      color      = "maroon",
      size       = 0.2
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(
      yintercept = 0,
      color      = "black",
      size       = 0.3
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = x_breaks,
      labels = x_labels,  # residues across the bottom, upright
      limits = c(0.5, seq_len + 0.5),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, max(1, y_lim) * 1.25),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Residue (one-letter)",
      y = "Probability"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(t = 60, r = 10, b = 60, l = 10),
      panel.grid.major   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      axis.line.y        = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.x       = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.y       = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      # residues upright (no rotation)
      axis.text.x        = ggplot2::element_text(
        color  = "black",
        angle  = 0,
        vjust  = 0.5,
        hjust  = 0.5,
        margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 4)
      ),
      axis.text.y        = ggplot2::element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.title.x       = ggplot2::element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 8)),
      axis.title.y       = ggplot2::element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 8)),
      panel.background   = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background    = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  
  ggiraph::girafe(
    ggobj      = p,
    width_svg  = width_svg,
    height_svg = 5,
    options    = list(
      ggiraph::opts_hover(css = "fill-opacity:1;cursor:pointer;"),
      ggiraph::opts_sizing(rescale = FALSE)  # fixed width for scroll
    )
  )
}

```


### 4. Helper: make one HTML page for a given model

This will:

- Sort entries descending by that max.
- Build 1119 interactive widgets and save to an HTML file under `figures/novo_highest scoring embeddings/`.

```{r}
make_html_for_model <- function(model_col, model_label, file_suffix, top_n = 300) {

  # Join entries in probs_df to SignalP scores, then order by SignalP desc
  entry_order <- probs_df %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Entry, signal_prob) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(signal_prob)) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Entry)

  message("Building ", length(entry_order), " entries for ", model_label,
          " ordered by SignalP SP(Sec/SPI) score")

  widgets <- purrr::map(
    entry_order,
    ~ make_profile_girafe(
        .x,
        model_col   = model_col,
        model_label = model_label
      )
  )

  spaced_widgets <- lapply(widgets, function(w) {
  htmltools::tags$div(
    style = "margin: 50px 20px; overflow-x: auto;",
    w
  )
  })

  all_page <- htmltools::tagList(
  lapply(spaced_widgets, function(w) list(w, htmltools::br()))
  )

  out_dir <- file.path("../../figures/novo_highest_scoring_embeddings")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  html_out <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("novo_50_60_", file_suffix, "_profiles.html"))
  htmltools::save_html(all_page, html_out)
  cat("✔ Saved", model_label, "interactive profiles to:", html_out, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
make_html_for_model("prob_mean_norm",   "Mean (from norm. models)",   "mean_norm_final",   top_n = 300)
```

```{r}
cat("probs_df Entry examples:\n")
print(head(unique(probs_df$Entry), 10))

cat("\nsignalp_df Entry examples:\n")
print(head(unique(signalp_df$Entry), 10))
```


```{r}
make_html_for_model("prob_logreg", "LogReg", "logreg_final", top_n = 300)
```

```{r}
make_html_for_model("prob_svm",    "SVM",    "svm",    top_n = 300)
```

```{r}
make_html_for_model("prob_crf",    "CRF",    "crf",    top_n = 300)
```

```{r}
#make_html_for_model("prob_rf",     "RF",     "rf",     top_n = 300)
```

```{r}
make_html_for_model("prob_mean",   "Mean",   "mean_unnorm_final",   top_n = 300)
```
